title: centaurea rutifolia subsp. pseudobovina
intro: Centaurea rutifolia subsp. pseudobovina, also known as mountain centaury, is a plant species that belongs to the genus Centaurea, a group of flowering plants commonly known as knapweed. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The mountain centaury is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and terpenoids. The herbal preparations of Centaurea rutifolia subsp. pseudobovina often include infusions and decoctions made from the leaves and flowers, which can be used to make teas or taken as supplements.
